title: Assistant Store Manager - Om Book Shop - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Om Book Shop - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Om Book Shop in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Om Book Shop:
Om Book Shop is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop!
